description: Configure a new medication frequency option in the OpenMRS Administration interface. Log in to https://localhost/openmrs/admin with username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. Create a concept named '5 Times Daily' with Class 'Frequency' (or 'Misc') and Datatype 'N/A'. Add a new Order Frequency for this concept with the Frequency per Day set to '5'. The browser is currently open to the login page.
